If the relevant memory area happened to be freed and reused in a certain way, a bounds check could fail and memory outside a buffer could be written to, or uninitialized data could be disclosed.\n\nNokogiri prior to version 1.10.5 contains a vulnerable version of libxslt. Nokogiri version 1.10.5 upgrades the dependency to libxslt 1.1.34, which contains a patch for this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.04446, "percentile": 0.9017}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-242x-7cm6-4w8j",
